title: tocoyena gracilis
intro: Tocoyena gracilis, also known as the Scarlet Bellflower or Yellow Trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Tocoyena gracilis include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Tocoyena gracilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
